DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) ARMANDO MERA FILED BY DEFENDANT VALVOLINE INSTANT OIL CHANGE FRANCHISING, INC.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF AUG-05-2025 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF AUG-05-2025 BY VISITING JUDGE TAMILA IPEMA. APPEARANCES: PLAINTIFF BLANCA ALICIA SANCHEZ IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT VALVOLINE INSTANT OIL CHANGE FRANCHISING, INC. IS PRESENT. CLERK: M. DE LUNA. MO EXHIBITS RETAINED. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-05-2025 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SANCHEZ, BLANCA ALICIA IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT VALVOLINE INSTANT OIL CHANGE FRANCHISING, INC. PLAINTIFF HAS FAILED TO MEET HER BURDEN OF PROOF. JUDGEMNT IN FAVOR OF DEFENDANT STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $4,000.00 FILED BY SANCHEZ, BLANCA ALICIA AS TO DEFENDANT VALVOLINE INSTANT OIL CHANGE FRANCHISING, INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-05-2025 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

REQUEST TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF SANCHEZ, BLANCA ALICIA ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52
